---
title: "Hillsboro County, Oregon"
subtitle: "2000"
number: 0
image: /images/clackamas.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Clackamas County, Oregon"
categories: ["Rate Setting"]

::: {.article}

# Solid Waste Collection and Program Analysis / Rate Setting
